title: Electrical safety tests at Ansbach Army Family Housing Feb-March
description: ANSBACH, Germany — The USAG Ansbach Directorate of Public Works (DPW) conducts electrical safety tests, or e–checks, at Bleidorn and Urlas Army Family H...
text:
Updated: Feb. 12, 2026
ANSBACH, Germany — The USAG Ansbach Directorate of Public Works (DPW) conducts electrical safety tests, or e–checks, at Bleidorn and Urlas Army Family Housing (AFH) February – March 2026.
Checks will be performed on all electrical devices and electrical systems, such as electrical outlets, fixtures and fuse boxes.
E–checks take approximately two hours per unit. Checks are either taken during AM hours from 8 a.m. – 12 p.m. or PM hours from 1 – 4 p.m.
Please ensure someone is home to allow access. Call DPW if you are unable to be home for the appointment. Call CIV 09641–70–587–1626, DSN 587–1626.
BLEIDORN KASERNE
Bldg. 5092 – Feb. 2–3
URLAS KASERNE
Bldg. 8400 A – Feb. 4 (AM)
Bldg. 8400 B – Feb. 13 (PM)
